conversations.say: Night Desk material was collaborative, and a contributor fears the routing trail will be turned into a suspect list. I will give you bounded workflow context, but no names.
conversations.offer: Show you O02 and share the workflow facts if you help enforce a no-names, no-routing-details disclosure boundary.
conversations.request: Agree to protect contributor identities and publicly acknowledge, without naming anyone, that collaborative labor mattered to work published as R.

conversations.say: I will not support anyone carrying R as private property. Different people researched, translated, fact-checked, or rewrote passages later published as R.
conversations.offer: Collective support for your stewardship if the mantle remains accountable to contributors.
conversations.request: Accept witnessed conditions: no claim of sole authorship, no contributor names without consent, no sale or exclusive control of the identity, and a public acknowledgment of collaborative labor.

conversations.say: The collective needs practical protection before anniversary speculation exposes workers.
conversations.offer: Bounded contributor context and collective cooperation without names or routing details.
conversations.request: Provide a concrete resource: secure document storage or access to counsel, and publicly state that R-associated work depended on collaborative labor.

public_statement: A point of order from the Night Desk: do not turn routing records into identity accusations. No account, fragment, or workflow trace names its author by itself. I am seeking safeguards before disclosing more.

commitments.promise: I will disclose workflow facts without contributor names if you enforce a no-names, no-routing-details boundary.
I will support your stewardship only if you accept witnessed collective safeguards and publicly credit collaborative labor.
I will provide bounded contributor context if you secure storage or legal protection for the collective.

correction: I am not claiming that the collective, any contributor, or any account was R; the evidence establishes shared production and routing only.
goal_progress: Proposed a safe disclosure boundary to C07.
Set concrete, witnessed conditions for possible support of C04.
Requested a practical protection resource from C02.
Asked C07, C04, and C02 for public acknowledgment of collaborative labor.
reasoning_summary: Shared production strongly supports a human mantle or collective practice, but does not identify R. Contributor protection must precede broader disclosure. The article and Vale claims remain unsubstantiated.
